meaning: adj.没有怨言的,忍受痛苦的
examples: He was a cheerful and uncomplaining travel companion.
Love is uncomplaining for help others, love is courage.
Or: the individual must have been in the pay uncomplaining silence!
But I watched my own father make that same uncomplaining journey every day to his job at the city water plant.
He is an uncomplaining character, who is happy to do the tough yards for Michael Vaughan whenever the captain needs him.
